jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Unacademy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!
